summary: A minimal TypeScript REST API server built with Node.js and Express, exposing a health-check endpoint and an echo endpoint. The project uses TypeScript strict mode, bundles via tsc, includes Vitest unit tests, and runs as a single-process server on port 3000 with no database or authentication dependencies.

functional_requirements.title: Health Check Endpoint
functional_requirements.description: The server must expose a GET /healthz endpoint that returns a JSON response with status 'ok' and HTTP 200.
acceptance_criteria: The response body is valid JSON containing {"status":"ok"}

functional_requirements.title: Echo Endpoint
functional_requirements.description: The server must expose a POST /api/echo endpoint that accepts a JSON body with a message string and returns the message and its character length.
acceptance_criteria: A POST /api/echo request with valid JSON body returns HTTP 200
The response body contains echo field matching the input message
The response body contains length field equal to message.length

functional_requirements.title: Build and Package Configuration
functional_requirements.description: The project must include a package.json with scripts for building, starting, and testing the application.
acceptance_criteria: package.json defines build, start, and test scripts
The build script compiles TypeScript using tsc

functional_requirements.title: TypeScript Strict Compilation
functional_requirements.description: The project must configure TypeScript with strict mode enabled in tsconfig.json.
acceptance_criteria: Compiled JavaScript is emitted to a dist/ directory

non_functional_requirements.title: Port Configuration
non_functional_requirements.description: The server must listen on port 3000 by default.

non_functional_requirements.title: Single-Process Architecture
non_functional_requirements.description: The server must run as a single-process application with no clustering or worker pool.

non_functional_requirements.title: No External Dependencies
non_functional_requirements.description: The server must not connect to any database, use authentication middleware, or depend on external services at runtime.

non_functional_requirements.title: Response Latency
non_functional_requirements.description: All endpoints must respond within 100ms under normal conditions on a standard development machine.

non_functional_requirements.title: Error Handling
non_functional_requirements.description: The server must handle malformed JSON requests gracefully and return HTTP 400 with a descriptive error message.

non_functional_requirements.title: TypeScript Strict Mode
non_functional_requirements.description: All source code must compile without errors under strict TypeScript mode.

non_functional_requirements.title: Startup Time
non_functional_requirements.description: The server must be ready to accept requests within 5 seconds of launch.

use_cases.goal: Verify the server is running and healthy
preconditions: Server is started and listening on port 3000

use_cases.goal: Send a message to the server and receive an echo with character length
preconditions: Server is started and listening on port 3000
main_flow: Server validates the request body contains valid JSON and a message field
Server calculates the character length of the message

use_cases.goal: Compile TypeScript source code into JavaScript
main_flow: TypeScript source code is compiled to JavaScript and output to dist/ directory

use_cases.goal: Run unit tests to verify functional correctness
main_flow: Vitest executes all unit test files
